CHAMP-COMBO.title: Combo
CHAMP-COMBO.description: Extra effect when played in the listed [gold]Stance[/gold].
CHAMP-FINISHER.title: Finisher
CHAMP-FINISHER.description:
Requires a [gold]Stance[/gold].
After playing a Finisher, exit your [gold]Stance[/gold] and trigger its Finisher bonus.
CHAMP-STANCE.title: Stance
CHAMP-STANCE.description: You may have only one Stance at a time.
